rulings.Case Title: 200 KANSAS OWNER LLC VS. KEENWAWA, INC. DBA BRIGHTLOOM
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 23, 2022 line 1. NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD is continued to August 26, 2022. Parties to file a joint declaration regarding the status of appeal including the date the appeal was filed/is to be timely filed; and if filed, the status of the proceedings. Joint declaration not to exceed 1 page and to be filed no later than August 24, 2022 by noon. =(501/HJ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: 1370 NATOMA LLC ET AL VS. LUCIA MUNOZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 23, 2022 line 7. DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege "the adjustments otherwise available under this Chapter 37" upon which the change in terms of tenancy is made. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Plaintiff alleged compliance with SFRO 37.9A(f)(4)(E). =(501/HJ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. KEVIN WOON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 23, 2022 line 10. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint clearly alleges that this "action" is not covered by CARES Act. This allegation is not uncertain. To the extent defendant argues that this tenancy is covered by the CARES Act, nothing on the face of the complaint indicated that Plaintiff is alleging otherwise. Furthermore, Complaint alleges that the operative notice was served on May 5, 2022 and expired on June 7, 2022. =(501/HJ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: OAK UNION STREET LLC VS. MME UNION RETAIL LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 23, 2022 line 11. DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in good faith that MM Enterprises is in possession of the premises (an element of a cause of action for unlawful detainer) or remove MM Enterprises as a defendant in this unlawful detainer action. Demurer is otherwise overruled. Notice is compliant with CCP 1161.2. =(501/HJ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: MURAT BAJRAMI VS. CAMERON G SCOTT
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 23, 2022 line 12. DEFENDANT CAMERON G. SCOTT'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT, VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT, AND RECALL WRIT OF POSSESSION is GRANTED.
